title: console#10843: Namespace and Pod selectors not populated in Logs & Events
notes:
2026-04-29 pass8: Bug from ghanshyam2005singh. Logs & Events shows No namespaces/No pods despite them existing. Prevents log viewing.
2026-04-29 pass8: Root cause: frontend fetches /api/namespaces but backend serves /api/mcp/namespaces. 404 causes empty selectors. Fix agent dispatched.
2026-04-29 pass8: Fix agent dispatched. PR#10846 created - changes /api/namespaces to /api/mcp/namespaces in useCachedK8sResources.ts. 1 file, 1 line fix. CI running.
2026-04-29 pass8: PR#10846 merged (23 CI checks green). Fixed /api/namespaces -> /api/mcp/namespaces route mismatch.

title: console#10841: Context canceled on namespace API requests

comments.author: scanner
comments.text:
## Scan Results for #10766 + #10784

### Issue #10766 — Nightly Test Suite failure (run 25071307267)
- **Root cause:** Vitest worker crash (`Worker exited unexpectedly`) — 3/1043 test files failed (47 tests).
- **Child issue #10765** (unit-test regression) was already **closed** by clubanderson.
- **Status:** Resolved — no further action needed on this issue.

### Issue #10784 — Playwright Cross-Browser Nightly (run 25078395182)
- **4 failed jobs:** webkit, firefox, mobile-safari, mobile-chrome.
- **Recurring failures (all browsers):**
  1. `Login.spec.ts:197` — `dashboard-page` testId not found after demo-mode login detection
  2. `Login.spec.ts:173` — URL assertion `toHaveURL(/\/login/)` fails after error banner (webkit + mobile-safari)
  3. `Dashboard.spec.ts:265` — `dashboard-page` testId not visible on mobile viewport (webkit)
  4. `rce-vector-scan.spec.ts:154` — execution context destroyed during navigation (firefox only)
- **Still failing** as of 2nd run (#25079822734) per bot comment.
- **Likely root cause:** Missing/broken `data-testid='dashboard-page'` after login redirect, possibly related to recent e2e mock changes (PR #10806 merged to fix health endpoint mocking).

### Recommendation
- #10766: Can be closed (child #10765 already resolved).
- #10784: Needs reviewer attention — Login.spec.ts failures across all browsers suggest a test setup issue (demo mode mock not landing on dashboard). PR #10806 was merged but issue still reproduces.
